Package index

Package Overview

Main package documentation and exported datasets/objects.

RCausalML-package RCausalML
RCausalML: Uplift Modeling and Causal Inference
rcausalml-datasets LBC_data diabetes ihdp_npci_3 sachs_data sachs_labels
Datasets included with RCausalML
rcausalml-extra-objects MultiArmCausalBoost multi_arm_ATE multi_arm_PEHE coef
Additional exported RCausalML objects

Meta-Learners

S-, T-, X-, R-, DR-, TMLE- and Domain-Adaptation learners for estimating the Conditional Average Treatment Effect (CATE).

SLearner()
S-Learner: single model with treatment as feature CATE(x) = mu(x,1) - mu(x,0). Aligned with causalml BaseSLearner. With treatment_type = "continuous", fits one surface \(\mu(X, D)\) and predicts \(\mu(X, d_1) - \mu(X, d_0)\) using dose_values (default: 25th and 75th percentiles of training \(D\)).
TLearner()
T-Learner: separate models for control and treatment (aligned with causalml BaseTLearner) With treatment_type = "continuous", splits \(D\) at dose_split (default median) into low vs high and fits the binary T-learner on that partition.
XLearner()
X-Learner (with propensity weighting). Aligned with causalml BaseXLearner. With treatment_type = "continuous", dichotomizes \(D\) at dose_split (default median) and fits the binary X-learner on high vs low dose.
RLearner()
R-Learner: minimize R-loss with cross-fitting. Aligned with causalml BaseRLearner. With treatment_type = "continuous", uses the Robinson partial-linear nuisance \(m(X)=\mathbb{E}[Y\mid X]\), \(e(X)=\mathbb{E}[D\mid X]\) and weighted effect regression on \((Y-m)/(D-e)\) (cf. r_learner_continuous for dose grids).
DRLearner()
DR-Learner: doubly robust pseudo-outcome with 3-fold cross-fitting (causalml-style)
ForestDRLearner()
Forest DR-Learner
LinearDRLearner()
Linear DR-Learner (econml-style)
SparseLinearDRLearner()
Sparse Linear DR-Learner (econml-style)
TMLELearner()
TMLE Learner (Targeted Maximum Likelihood Estimation). Like causalml TMLELearner.
DomainAdaptationLearner()
Domain adaptation meta-learner (EconML DomainAdaptationLearner)
XGBDRLearner()
XGBoost DR-Learner
XGBDRRegressor()
XGBDRRegressor: DR-Learner with XGBoost (causalml-style; see DRLearner)
XGBRRegressor()
XGBRRegressor: R-Learner with XGBoost
XGBSRegressor()
XGBSRegressor: S-Learner with XGBoost
XGBTRegressor()
XGBTRegressor: T-Learner with XGBoost (like Python XGBTRegressor)
XGBXRegressor()
XGBXRegressor: X-Learner with XGBoost

Double Machine Learning (DML)

EconML-aligned DML learners for partially-linear and non-parametric causal effect estimation.

DMLearner()
DMLearner: Double machine learning (EconML econml.dml.DML family)
LinearDML()
LinearDML: DML with OLS / stats final stage (EconML LinearDML)
SparseLinearDML()
SparseLinearDML: DML with Lasso / elastic-net final (EconML SparseLinearDML)
KernelDML()
KernelDML: DML with random Fourier features then linear CATE (EconML KernelDML)
NonParamDML()
NonParamDML: DML with flexible final regressor (EconML NonParamDML)
CausalForestDML()
CausalForestDML: first-stage DML + grf causal forest on residuals (EconML CausalForestDML)
DynamicDMLearner()
Dynamic Double Machine Learning (panel data, native R)
r_learner_continuous()
Generalized R-learner for continuous treatment (dose-response on a grid)

Instrumental Variable (IV) Learners

IV and 2SLS methods including OrthoIV, DMLIV, NonParamDMLIV, DRIV, Boosted IV forest, and panel IV.

OrthoIVLearner()
Orthogonal Double ML with instrumental variables (OrthoIV)
DMLIVLearner()
DML IV with linear CATE (DMLIV, native R)
NonParamDMLIVLearner()
Nonparametric DML IV (NonParamDMLIV, native R)
driv_learner()
Doubly Robust Instrumental Variable (DRIV) learner for conditional LATE 3-fold cross-fit: fit e0(x), e1(x), m0(x), m1(x); then fit tau(X) minimizing DR IV loss.
iv_2sls()
Two-stage least squares (2SLS) for causal effect with instrumental variable First stage: W ~ Z + X. Second stage: Y ~ W_hat + X.
late_iv()
Local Average Treatment Effect (LATE) via IV LATE = (E[Y|Z=1] - E[Y|Z=0]) / (E[W|Z=1] - E[W|Z=0])
BoostedIVForest
BoostedIVForest: Boosted causal forest with instrumental variables
boosted_iv_forest()
Fit a BoostedIVForest and return predictions in a single call.
load_boosted_iv()
Load a BoostedIVForest model from disk.
save_boosted_iv()
Save a BoostedIVForest model to disk.
register_boosted_iv_parsnip()
Register a parsnip model spec for BoostedIVForest (tidymodels shim).

DoubleML Bridges

Bridges to the DoubleML R package: partially linear regression, partially linear IV, DiD-style DML, and data helpers.

doubleml_plr()
Fit Partially Linear DML via DoubleML (R) when available
doubleml_plr_fit_data()
Fit DoubleML PLR from a DoubleMLData object and mlr3 learners
doubleml_plr_tune_data()
Tune then fit DoubleML PLR (mlr3tuning + DoubleMLPLR$tune)
doubleml_pliv()
Partially linear IV DML via DoubleML (DoubleMLPLIV)
doubleml_did_linear() doubleml_did_rf() doubleml_did_xgboost() doubleml_did_eval_linear() doubleml_did_eval_rf() doubleml_did_eval_xgboost()
DoubleML DiD wrappers (linear / ranger / xgboost nuisances)
doubleml_did_eval_preds()
Evaluate cross-fitted nuisance predictions for DoubleML DiD
doubleml_data_from_data_frame()
Build DoubleMLData or DoubleMLClusterData from a data frame
doubleml_data_from_matrix()
Build DoubleMLData from matrices (X, y, d, optional z, etc.)
doubleml_fetch_401k()
401(k) data (DoubleML fetch_401k)
doubleml_fetch_bonus()
Pennsylvania bonus experiment data (DoubleML fetch_bonus)
doubleml_make_plr_CCDDHNR2018()
Simulated PLR data (Chernozhukov et al., 2018 Fig. 1 DGP)
doubleml_make_pliv_CHS2015()
Simulated PLIV data (Chernozhukov, Hansen, Spindler, 2015)

Uplift Trees & Forests

Tree and forest-based uplift models using KL divergence, Euclidean distance, chi-squared, and continuous splitting criteria.

uplift_rf_kl()
Uplift random forest using KL divergence splitting criterion
uplift_rf_ed()
Uplift RF with Euclidean distance criterion
uplift_rf_chi()
Uplift RF with Chi-squared criterion
uplift_rf_cts()
Uplift Random Forest on Contextual Treatment Selection (CTS) Split criterion: expected value of best treatment in children vs parent.
uplift_rf_multi()
Multi-treatment uplift random forest (Python UpliftRandomForestClassifier-style). Fits one uplift forest per treatment arm (control vs treatment_k). predict(..., full_output=TRUE) returns control/treatment probabilities, deltas, recommended_treatment, max_delta.
uplift_tree_ddp()
Uplift tree on delta-delta-p (DDP) criterion; binary outcome only
uplift_tree_iddp()
Uplift tree on IDDP criterion; binary outcome only
causal_tree()
Causal Tree (Honest or Adaptive)
causal_inference_tree()
Causal Inference Tree (CIT); binary treatment, continuous or binary outcome. For continuous outcome, leaf tau = E[Y|T=1] - E[Y|T=0]; split uses same t-statistic as IT.
interaction_tree()
Interaction Tree (IT); binary treatment, continuous or binary outcome. For continuous outcome, leaf tau = E[Y|T=1] - E[Y|T=0]; split uses t-statistic on mean difference (Su et al.).

Causal Forests (GRF)

Wrappers and extensions around the grf package for causal, survival, and multi-arm forests with IV support.

causal_forest()
Fit a Causal Forest
grf_causal_forest()
Causal forest (grf implementation)
causal_survival_forest()
Causal survival forest (grf)
multi_arm_causal_forest()
Multi-arm causal forest (grf)
instrumental_forest()
Instrumental forest (grf)
causal_forest_confounder()
Causal forest with confounders
grf_average_treatment_effect()
Average treatment effect (grf implementation)
grf_variable_importance()
Variable importance for a grf forest
get_forest_weights()
Forest kernel weights (grf)
get_leaf_node()
Leaf node for each sample in a grf tree
get_tree()
Get a single tree from a grf forest
split_frequencies()
Split frequencies of a grf forest
test_calibration()
Test calibration of a grf forest

Policy Learning

DR-based policy trees and forests, and log-risk-based policy learners for treatment assignment.

policy_learner()
Policy Learner: treatment assignment policy with doubly robust estimator
DRPolicyTree()
DR Policy Tree (EconML-style)
DRPolicyForest()
DR Policy Forest (EconML-style)
LRSRegressor()
LRSRegressor: S-Learner with linear regression (like Python LRSRegressor)

CATE Interpretation

Single-tree CATE and policy interpreters plus SHAP-based explanation.

SingleTreeCateInterpreter()
Single-tree CATE interpreter
SingleTreePolicyInterpreter()
Single-tree policy interpreter
explain_cate()
Compute SHAP values for any RCausalML CATE model

Propensity Score & Matching

Propensity score estimation (GLM, glmnet, GBM) and nearest-neighbour and group matching with covariate balance diagnostics.

compute_propensity_score()
Compute propensity scores (train and optionally predict)
propensity_model
Propensity model object (abstract interface)
propensity_glm()
Logistic regression propensity score
propensity_glmnet()
Elastic net propensity score model (glmnet)
propensity_model_logistic_regression()
Logistic regression propensity model (elastic net)
propensity_model_elastic_net()
Elastic net propensity model
propensity_model_gradient_boosted()
Gradient boosted propensity model (XGBoost)
nearest_neighbor_match()
Nearest neighbor propensity score matching
match_optimizer()
Match optimizer: search for best caliper / pihat / score_cols
match_by_group()
Stratified nearest neighbor matching by group
smd()
Standardized Mean Difference (SMD) of a feature between treatment and control
create_table_one()
Create Table One: balance table for treatment vs control
one_sided()
One-sided confounding function (ATE)
one_sided_att()
One-sided confounding function for ATT
alignment()
Alignment confounding function (ATE)
alignment_att()
Alignment confounding function for ATT

Causal XGBoost

DragonNet-style two-head causal XGBoost (CXGBoost R6 class) and its multi-arm extension.

CXGBoost
C-XGBoost: Boosted causal outcome model with propensity scoring
run_cxgboost_example()
Run the built-in CXGBoost demonstration.
save_cxgboost()
Save a CXGBoost model to disk (standalone wrapper).
load_cxgboost()
Load a saved CXGBoost model from disk.
load_cxgboost_extensions()
Load causal boosting extensions from the R directory
load_multi_arm_causal_boost()
Load a saved MultiArmCausalBoost model
run_multi_arm_causal_boost_example()
Run a built-in multi-arm causal boost example
save_multi_arm_causal_boost()
Save a MultiArmCausalBoost model

Deep Causal Neural Networks

PyTorch/torch-based neural causal models including DragonNet, TARNet, CFRNet, CEVAE, DCEVAE, GANITE, CausalGAN, CausalEGM, iVAE, and Causal Discrepancy VAE.

dragonnet()
DragonNet — shared representation and three heads (torch)
tarnet()
TARNet — Treatment-Agnostic Representation Network
cfrnet()
CFRNet — Counterfactual Regression Network (TARNet + MMD balancing)
cevae()
CEVAE (Counterfactual Variational Autoencoder)
ganite()
GANITE — Causal Inference with Generative Adversarial Nets
causal_vae()
CausalVAE
CausalVAE()
Build a CausalVAE nn_module instance
causalGAN()
CausalGAN (Structural Equation GAN)
causal_egm()
CausalEGM
CausalEGM()
Alias for causal_egm
causal_discrepancy_vae()
CausalDiscrepancyVAE
CausalDiscrepancyVAE()
Alias for causal_discrepancy_vae
ivae()
iVAE (Identifiable Variational Autoencoder)
interventional_elbo_loss()
Negative ELBO loss for the Interventional CRL model

Structural Causal Models (SCMs)

Deep SCMs with variational noise encoders (DeepSCM), DECI (joint graph + equation learning), and DAGMA-based continuous DAG estimation.

dscm()
Deep Structural Causal Model (DSCM)
dagma()
DAGMA unified interface
dagmaLinear()
DAGMA for linear SEMs
DagmaMLP()
DagmaMLP module constructor
demo_linear()
Demo: linear NOTEARS on synthetic data
demo_nonlinear_mlp()
Demo: nonlinear NOTEARS (MLP) on synthetic data
demo_nonlinear_sobolev()
Demo: nonlinear NOTEARS (Sobolev) on random data

Causal Structure Learning

NOTEARS, DAGMA, CASTLE, and the unified causalStructureML interface for DAG discovery from observational data.

causalStructureML()
Causal structure learning (unified API)
causal_structure_ml_model_descriptions()
Short descriptions of causal structure learning methods
notears_linear()
Linear NOTEARS: min L(W;X) + lambda1||W||_1 s.t. h(W)=0
notears_nonlinear
Nonlinear NOTEARS via Adam then L-BFGS (MLP or Sobolev)
NOTEARS
NOTEARS: Causal DAG structure learning via continuous optimization
castle()
CASTLE (CAusal STructure LEarning Regularization)
is_dag()
Check if weighted adjacency matrix W defines a DAG
simulate_dag()
Simulate random DAG with expected number of edges
count_accuracy()
Accuracy metrics: estimated graph vs ground truth

Temporal & GNN Causal Models

Neural Granger-causality (cMLP, cLSTM, EconomySRU, NRI), Temporal Causal VAE, and TCDF (attention-based dilated-convolution causal discovery).

neural_granger_ml()
Neural Granger Causality Models for Multivariate Time Series
neuralGrangerML()
Alias for neural_granger_ml
TemporalCausalVAE()
Temporal Causal VAE (Variational Autoencoder with Causal Dynamics)
temporal_causal_loss()
Total loss for the Temporal Causal VAE
TCDF_find_causes()
Discover potential causes for one target time series (TCDF)

Automated Machine Learning

AutoML wrappers for nuisance and treatment-effect models with EconML-aligned configuration.

AutomatedMLModel()
AutomatedML model: fit and predict using auto-selected learner
add_automated_ml() addAutomatedML()
Replace EconAutoMLConfig args with AutomatedMLModel instances
set_automated_ml_workspace() setAutomatedMLWorkspace()
Set configuration for AutomatedML (local experiments)
EconAutoMLConfig()
Create an EconML-style AutoML config for causal estimators
tune_hyperparameters()
Tune CausalVAE hyperparameters

Counterfactual & Value Estimation

Counterfactual unit selection, value estimation, and causal sensitivity analysis utilities.

counterfactual_unit_selection()
Counterfactual Unit Selection: select units to maximize beta*P(complier|X) + gamma*P(always-taker|X) + theta*P(never-taker|X) + delta*P(defier|X). Requires estimates of P(favourable|X,W=0) and P(favourable|X,W=1) (e.g. from outcome model). Complier: favourable iff treated. Always: favourable either way. Never: never favourable. Defier: favourable iff not treated.
counterfactual_value_estimator()
Counterfactual value estimator: E[(v - cc_w) * Y_w - ic_w]
sensitivity_analysis()
Run sensitivity analysis for one or more methods
sensitivity()
Create a sensitivity analysis object
causalsens_selection_bias()
Selection bias: causalsens over alpha range
partial_rsqs_confounding()
Map partial R² of a feature to confounding amount (alpha range)
loss_function()
CausalVAE loss function

Evaluation Metrics

PEHE, ATE error, gain and Qini curves, classification and regression metrics for benchmarking causal models.

ATE()
Absolute Error in Average Treatment Effect (ATE)
ATE_error()
Absolute Error in Average Treatment Effect
PEHE()
Precision in Estimation of Heterogeneous Effects (PEHE)
gain_curve()
Gain curve: cumulative sum of true tau (normalized to 1) when ordered by pred
get_cumgain()
Get cumulative gain (Python get_cumgain). gain = lift * index (cumulative gain at each position).
get_cumlift()
Get cumulative lift (Python get_cumlift). Average uplift in cumulative population when sorted by pred descending.
qini_curve()
Qini curve: cumulative true treatment effect when units ordered by predicted CATE (descending)
qini_score()
Qini score for each model column in a results data frame (like Python qini_score)
qini_score_vec()
Qini score: area under Qini curve (trapezoidal)
classification_metrics()
Classification metrics (AUC proxy, accuracy) by treatment group
regression_metrics()
Regression metrics (MSE, MAE, R2) by treatment group
rank_average_treatment_effect()
Rank-weighted average treatment effect (grf)
average_treatment_effect()
Estimate Average Treatment Effect from a causal forest
best_linear_projection()
Best linear projection of CATE (grf)
variable_importance()
Variable importance from split frequency
feature_importances()
Feature importances for policy / tree models
get_importance()
Feature importance for uplift modeling (filter methods)

Synthetic Data & Simulation

Simulation functions for benchmarking — randomized trials, hidden confounders, linear/nonlinear SEMs, and uplift classification/regression.

generate_data()
Generate synthetic data for CausalVAE examples
synthetic_data()
Main entry: generate synthetic data by mode
make_uplift_classification()
Uplift classification dataset
make_uplift_regression()
Uplift regression dataset (continuous outcome)
simulate_randomized_trial()
Synthetic data: randomized trial (Setup B)
simulate_hidden_confounder()
Synthetic data: hidden confounder (Louizos et al.)
simulate_linear_sem()
Simulate samples from linear SEM
simulate_nonlinear_sem()
Simulate samples from nonlinear SEM (mlp, mim; no GP)
simulate_easy_propensity_difficult_baseline()
Synthetic data: easy propensity, difficult baseline (Setup C)
simulate_nuisance_and_easy_treatment()
Synthetic data with difficult nuisance and easy treatment (Setup A)
simulate_unrelated_treatment_control()
Synthetic data: unrelated treatment and control (Setup D)
simulate_parameter()
Simulate SEM edge weights for a DAG

Datasets

Built-in datasets and access helpers for the causaldata package.

rcausalml-datasets LBC_data diabetes ihdp_npci_3 sachs_data sachs_labels
Datasets included with RCausalML
list_causaldata_datasets()
List causaldata datasets supported for RCausalML
load_causaldata()
Load a causaldata dataset in RCausalML-ready form

Visualization

Plotting functions for uplift curves, gain curves, Qini curves, causal trees, forests, DAG networks, and sensitivity analyses.

plot_gain()
Plot gain chart (Python plot_gain). Uses get_cumgain for observed uplift so curve matches Python.
plot_qini()
Plot Qini chart: cumulative true treatment effect vs population fraction (like Python plot_qini)
plot_sensitivity()
Plot sensitivity analysis (Selection Bias causalsens output)
uplift_forest_plot()
Plot multiple trees from an uplift forest (ensemble visualization)
uplift_tree_plot()
Plot an uplift tree (base R), with arrows connecting each split to its children
uplift_tree_string()
Print uplift tree as a string (for interpretation and diagnosis)
uplift_tree_to_rpart()
Convert an uplift tree (list) to an rpart object for use with rpart.plot
draw_network()
Draw a network (graph) with nodes and edges
draw_networkx_edges()
Draw network edges
draw_networkx_labels()
Draw node labels
draw_networkx_nodes()
Draw network nodes at given positions

Graph Layout Utilities

Network layout helpers (wrappers for igraph/ggraph layout algorithms).

bfs_layout()
BFS layout: layers by breadth-first search from a start node
bipartite_layout()
Bipartite layout: two parallel lines (vertical or horizontal)
circular_layout()
Circular layout: place nodes on a circle
fruchterman_reingold_layout()
Alias for spring_layout (NetworkX name)
kamada_kawai_layout()
Kamada-Kawai layout (path-length cost)
multipartite_layout()
Multipartite (layered) layout
random_layout()
Random layout: place nodes uniformly at random in the unit square
rescale_layout()
Rescale layout positions to (-scale, scale) on all axes
rescale_layout_dict()
Rescale a layout given as named list or matrix
shell_layout()
Shell layout: place nodes in concentric circles (shells)
spectral_layout()
Spectral layout (eigenvectors of graph Laplacian)
spiral_layout()
Spiral layout
spring_layout()
Spring layout (Fruchterman-Reingold force-directed)

Utilities

Miscellaneous helper functions, seed setting, filters, and example runners.

set_random_seed()
Set random seed for reproducibility (R and torch)
run_example()
Run the built-in demonstration example.
print_optimization_summary()
Print optimization summary for CausalVAE helpers
filter_D()
Rank features by divergence measure (bin-based uplift filter)
filter_F()
Rank features by F-statistic of treatment-feature interaction
filter_LR()
Rank features by likelihood-ratio statistic of treatment-feature interaction
treat()
Assign treatment from a policy interpreter (generic)
effect()
Effect of treatment change (generic)
intercept()
Intercept of the linear CATE model (generic)
fit()
Generic fit for meta-learners
fit_predict()
Generic fit_predict for meta-learners
predict_proba()
Predict probability of treatment assignment (P(treat))
predict_value()
Predict expected value under each treatment (policy value)
interpret()
Interpret a CATE or policy model with a tree (generic)
causal_vae_opt()
Optimized CausalVAE
train_causalvae()
Train CausalVAE from dataloaders
CausalVAE_ATE()
Build a CausalVAE model with ATE head
estimate_ate_causalvae_ate()
Estimate ATE from CausalVAE_ATE model
estimate_ate()
Estimate Average Treatment Effect from a fitted meta-learner or fit-predict

S3 Methods — fit / predict / estimate_ate

Method dispatches for the generic fit(), fit_predict(), predict(), and estimate_ate() interfaces shared across all learners.

fit(<SLearner>)
Fit S-Learner
fit(<TMLELearner>)
Fit TMLE learner (stores outcome model; TMLE step done in estimate_ate)
fit(<DMLearner>)
Fit DMLearner — cross-fitting and final stage (EconML DML.fit)
fit(<DMLIVLearner>)
Fit DMLIVLearner (native R)
fit(<DomainAdaptationLearner>)
Fit a DomainAdaptationLearner model
fit(<DRLearner>)
Fit DR-Learner
fit(<DRPolicyForest>)
Fit DR Policy Forest
fit(<DRPolicyTree>)
Fit DR Policy Tree
fit(<DynamicDMLearner>)
Fit DynamicDMLearner (panel data, native R)
fit(<NonParamDMLIVLearner>)
Fit NonParamDMLIVLearner (native R)
fit(<OrthoIVLearner>)
Fit OrthoIVLearner (native R)
fit(<policy_learner>)
Fit the policy learner
fit(<AutomatedMLModel>)
Fit AutomatedMLModel: select best learner via CV and refit on full data
fit_predict(<SLearner>)
Fit and predict S-Learner (like Python fit_predict)
fit_predict(<TLearner>)
Fit and predict T-Learner (like Python fit_predict)
fit_predict(<XLearner>)
Fit and predict X-Learner (like Python fit_predict)
fit_predict(<RLearner>)
Fit and predict R-Learner (like Python fit_predict)
fit_predict(<DMLearner>)
Fit and predict (DMLearner)
fit_predict(<DomainAdaptationLearner>)
Fit and predict with DomainAdaptationLearner
fit_predict(<DRLearner>)
Fit and predict CATE (DR-learner)
fit_predict_cevae()
Fit CEVAE and predict ITE (fit_predict)
predict(<SLearner>)
Predict CATE from S-Learner
predict(<TLearner>)
Predict CATE from T-Learner
predict(<XLearner>)
Predict CATE from X-Learner. When p is NULL and model was fit without p, uses stored propensity or 0.5.
predict(<DMLearner>)
Predict CATE from fitted DMLearner
predict(<DMLIVLearner>)
Predict CATE from fitted DMLIVLearner
predict(<DomainAdaptationLearner>)
Predict CATE with a fitted DomainAdaptationLearner
predict(<DRLearner>)
Predict CATE from DR-Learner
predict(<DRPolicyForest>)
Predict recommended treatment (DR Policy Forest) — majority vote
predict(<DRPolicyTree>)
Predict recommended treatment (DR Policy Tree)
predict(<DynamicDMLearner>)
Predict CATE (constant marginal effect) from fitted DynamicDMLearner
predict(<NonParamDMLIVLearner>)
Predict CATE from fitted NonParamDMLIVLearner
predict(<OrthoIVLearner>)
Predict CATE from fitted OrthoIVLearner
predict(<AutomatedMLModel>)
Predict using fitted AutomatedMLModel
predict(<policy_learner>)
Predict treatment assignment (0 or 1)
predict(<SingleTreeCateInterpreter>)
Predict CATE from the interpreted tree (simplified model)
predict(<SingleTreePolicyInterpreter>)
Predict recommended treatment from SingleTreePolicyInterpreter (alias for treat)
predict(<dragonnet>)
Predict CATE (and optionally propensity) from DragonNet
predict(<tarnet>)
Predict CATE from TARNet
predict(<cfrnet>)
Predict CATE from CFRNet
predict(<cevae>)
Predict ITE from CEVAE (or placeholder)
predict(<ganite>)
Predict ITE from GANITE
predict(<causal_vae>)
Predict latent codes from CausalVAE
predict(<causalGAN>)
Predict from CausalGAN
predict(<causal_forest>)
Predict treatment effects from a causal forest
predict(<causal_egm>)
Predict from CausalEGM
predict(<causal_discrepancy_vae>)
Predict from CausalDiscrepancyVAE
predict(<causal_inference_tree>)
Predict method for causal_inference_tree
predict(<interaction_tree>)
Predict method for interaction_tree
predict(<instrumental_forest>)
Predict with an instrumental forest (grf)
predict(<ivae>)
Predict latent representation from iVAE
predict(<neural_granger_ml>)
Predict from neural Granger models
predict(<driv_learner>)
Predict conditional LATE from DRIV learner
predict(<dscm>)
Predict from Deep Structural Causal Model (DSCM)
predict(<castle>)
Predict outcome from CASTLE
predict(<uplift_rf>)
Predict CATE (and optionally probabilities) from uplift_rf object. When full_output=TRUE and model has tree leaves with p0/p1, returns data.frame with control, treatment, delta (Python-style).
predict(<uplift_rf_multi>)
Predict from uplift_rf_multi. full_output=TRUE returns Python-style DataFrame.
predict(<uplift_tree_ddp>)
Predict from single uplift tree (DDP, IDDP, IT, CIT)
predict(<uplift_tree_iddp>)
Predict method for uplift_tree_iddp
estimate_ate(<SLearner>)
Estimate ATE for S-Learner (analytical SE or bootstrap). Like Python BaseSLearner.estimate_ate. For LRSRegressor (learner = "lm") returns OLS coefficient and confint like Python LRSRegressor.estimate_ate.
estimate_ate(<TLearner>)
Estimate ATE for T-Learner. Like Python BaseTLearner.estimate_ate.
estimate_ate(<XLearner>)
Estimate ATE for X-Learner. Like Python BaseXLearner.estimate_ate.
estimate_ate(<RLearner>)
Estimate ATE for R-Learner. Like Python BaseRLearner.estimate_ate (analytical SE).
estimate_ate(<DMLearner>)
Estimate ATE for DMLearner
estimate_ate(<DomainAdaptationLearner>)
Estimate ATE for DomainAdaptationLearner
estimate_ate(<DRLearner>)
Estimate Average Treatment Effect (ATE) for DR-Learner
estimate_ate(<TMLELearner>)
Estimate ATE for TMLE Learner. Like Python TMLELearner.estimate_ate.
estimate_ate(<default>)
Default ATE estimation dispatcher

S3 Methods — coef / intercept / effect / interpret / treat

Additional method dispatches for coefficient extraction, effect computation, interpretation, and treatment assignment.

coef(<LinearDML>) coef(<SparseLinearDML>)
Coefficients of the linear CATE model (LinearDML or SparseLinearDML)
coef(<LinearDRLearner>) coef(<SparseLinearDRLearner>)
Coefficient(s) of the linear CATE model (LinearDRLearner or SparseLinearDRLearner)
intercept(<LinearDML>) intercept(<SparseLinearDML>)
Intercept of the linear CATE model (LinearDML or SparseLinearDML)
intercept(<LinearDRLearner>) intercept(<SparseLinearDRLearner>)
Intercept(s) of the linear CATE model (LinearDRLearner or SparseLinearDRLearner)
effect(<DynamicDMLearner>)
Effect of treatment change (DynamicDMLearner)
interpret(<SingleTreeCateInterpreter>)
Interpret a CATE estimator with a single tree
interpret(<SingleTreePolicyInterpreter>)
Interpret a policy from a CATE estimator with a single tree
treat(<SingleTreePolicyInterpreter>)
Assign treatment using the interpreted policy tree
feature_importances(<DRPolicyForest>)
Feature importances (average over trees)
feature_importances(<DRPolicyTree>)
Feature importances from policy tree (variable importance from rpart)
predict_proba(<AutomatedMLModel>)
Predict class probabilities using fitted AutomatedMLModel (classification only)
predict_proba(<DRPolicyForest>)
Predict probability of recommending each treatment (DR Policy Forest) Average of tree probabilities.
predict_proba(<DRPolicyTree>)
Predict probability of recommending each treatment (DR Policy Tree)
predict_proba(<policy_learner>)
Predict probability of treatment assignment (P(treat))
predict_value(<DRPolicyTree>)
Predict expected value under each treatment (DR Policy Tree) Returns the predicted CATE (value vs control) for each treatment.
predict_best_treatment(<counterfactual_value_estimator>)
Predict best treatment from value estimator
rank_average_treatment_effect.fit()
Rank-weighted average treatment effect fit (grf)

S3 Methods — print / summary / plot

Print, summary, and plot methods for package objects.

print.causal_forest()
Print method for causal_forest
summary.causal_forest()
Summary method for causal_forest
summary.castle()
Summarize CASTLE structure
plot(<castle>)
Plot CASTLE graph
plot(<grf_tree>)
Plot grf tree (grf)
plot(<rank_average_treatment_effect>)
Plot rank_average_treatment_effect (grf)
policy_feature_names()
Policy feature names (EconML API compatibility)
notears-imports
Internal imports for NOTEARS utilities

Internal Functions

Low-level internal helpers (not intended for direct use).

ATE()
Absolute Error in Average Treatment Effect (ATE)
ATE_error()
Absolute Error in Average Treatment Effect
AutomatedMLModel()
AutomatedML model: fit and predict using auto-selected learner
BoostedIVForest
BoostedIVForest: Boosted causal forest with instrumental variables
CXGBoost
C-XGBoost: Boosted causal outcome model with propensity scoring
CausalDiscrepancyVAE()
Alias for causal_discrepancy_vae
CausalEGM()
Alias for causal_egm
CausalForestDML()
CausalForestDML: first-stage DML + grf causal forest on residuals (EconML CausalForestDML)
CausalVAE()
Build a CausalVAE nn_module instance
CausalVAE_ATE()
Build a CausalVAE model with ATE head
DMLIVLearner()
DML IV with linear CATE (DMLIV, native R)
DMLearner()
DMLearner: Double machine learning (EconML econml.dml.DML family)
DRLearner()
DR-Learner: doubly robust pseudo-outcome with 3-fold cross-fitting (causalml-style)
DRPolicyForest()
DR Policy Forest (EconML-style)
DRPolicyTree()
DR Policy Tree (EconML-style)
DagmaMLP()
DagmaMLP module constructor
DomainAdaptationLearner()
Domain adaptation meta-learner (EconML DomainAdaptationLearner)
DynamicDMLearner()
Dynamic Double Machine Learning (panel data, native R)
EconAutoMLConfig()
Create an EconML-style AutoML config for causal estimators
ForestDRLearner()
Forest DR-Learner
KernelDML()
KernelDML: DML with random Fourier features then linear CATE (EconML KernelDML)
LRSRegressor()
LRSRegressor: S-Learner with linear regression (like Python LRSRegressor)
LinearDML()
LinearDML: DML with OLS / stats final stage (EconML LinearDML)
LinearDRLearner()
Linear DR-Learner (econml-style)
NOTEARS
NOTEARS: Causal DAG structure learning via continuous optimization
NonParamDML()
NonParamDML: DML with flexible final regressor (EconML NonParamDML)
NonParamDMLIVLearner()
Nonparametric DML IV (NonParamDMLIV, native R)
OrthoIVLearner()
Orthogonal Double ML with instrumental variables (OrthoIV)
PEHE()
Precision in Estimation of Heterogeneous Effects (PEHE)
RCausalML-package RCausalML
RCausalML: Uplift Modeling and Causal Inference
RLearner()
R-Learner: minimize R-loss with cross-fitting. Aligned with causalml BaseRLearner. With treatment_type = "continuous", uses the Robinson partial-linear nuisance \(m(X)=\mathbb{E}[Y\mid X]\), \(e(X)=\mathbb{E}[D\mid X]\) and weighted effect regression on \((Y-m)/(D-e)\) (cf. r_learner_continuous for dose grids).
SLearner()
S-Learner: single model with treatment as feature CATE(x) = mu(x,1) - mu(x,0). Aligned with causalml BaseSLearner. With treatment_type = "continuous", fits one surface \(\mu(X, D)\) and predicts \(\mu(X, d_1) - \mu(X, d_0)\) using dose_values (default: 25th and 75th percentiles of training \(D\)).
SingleTreeCateInterpreter()
Single-tree CATE interpreter
SingleTreePolicyInterpreter()
Single-tree policy interpreter
SparseLinearDML()
SparseLinearDML: DML with Lasso / elastic-net final (EconML SparseLinearDML)
SparseLinearDRLearner()
Sparse Linear DR-Learner (econml-style)
TCDF_find_causes()
Discover potential causes for one target time series (TCDF)
TLearner()
T-Learner: separate models for control and treatment (aligned with causalml BaseTLearner) With treatment_type = "continuous", splits \(D\) at dose_split (default median) into low vs high and fits the binary T-learner on that partition.
TMLELearner()
TMLE Learner (Targeted Maximum Likelihood Estimation). Like causalml TMLELearner.
TemporalCausalVAE()
Temporal Causal VAE (Variational Autoencoder with Causal Dynamics)
XGBDRLearner()
XGBoost DR-Learner
XGBDRRegressor()
XGBDRRegressor: DR-Learner with XGBoost (causalml-style; see DRLearner)
XGBRRegressor()
XGBRRegressor: R-Learner with XGBoost
XGBSRegressor()
XGBSRegressor: S-Learner with XGBoost
XGBTRegressor()
XGBTRegressor: T-Learner with XGBoost (like Python XGBTRegressor)
XGBXRegressor()
XGBXRegressor: X-Learner with XGBoost
XLearner()
X-Learner (with propensity weighting). Aligned with causalml BaseXLearner. With treatment_type = "continuous", dichotomizes \(D\) at dose_split (default median) and fits the binary X-learner on high vs low dose.
add_automated_ml() addAutomatedML()
Replace EconAutoMLConfig args with AutomatedMLModel instances
alignment()
Alignment confounding function (ATE)
alignment_att()
Alignment confounding function for ATT
average_treatment_effect()
Estimate Average Treatment Effect from a causal forest
best_linear_projection()
Best linear projection of CATE (grf)
bfs_layout()
BFS layout: layers by breadth-first search from a start node
bipartite_layout()
Bipartite layout: two parallel lines (vertical or horizontal)
boosted_iv_forest()
Fit a BoostedIVForest and return predictions in a single call.
castle()
CASTLE (CAusal STructure LEarning Regularization)
causalGAN()
CausalGAN (Structural Equation GAN)
causalStructureML()
Causal structure learning (unified API)
causal_discrepancy_vae()
CausalDiscrepancyVAE
causal_egm()
CausalEGM
causal_forest()
Fit a Causal Forest
causal_forest_confounder()
Causal forest with confounders
causal_inference_tree()
Causal Inference Tree (CIT); binary treatment, continuous or binary outcome. For continuous outcome, leaf tau = E[Y|T=1] - E[Y|T=0]; split uses same t-statistic as IT.
causal_structure_ml_model_descriptions()
Short descriptions of causal structure learning methods
causal_survival_forest()
Causal survival forest (grf)
causal_tree()
Causal Tree (Honest or Adaptive)
causal_vae()
CausalVAE
causal_vae_opt()
Optimized CausalVAE
causalsens_selection_bias()
Selection bias: causalsens over alpha range
cevae()
CEVAE (Counterfactual Variational Autoencoder)
cfrnet()
CFRNet — Counterfactual Regression Network (TARNet + MMD balancing)
circular_layout()
Circular layout: place nodes on a circle
classification_metrics()
Classification metrics (AUC proxy, accuracy) by treatment group
coef(<LinearDML>) coef(<SparseLinearDML>)
Coefficients of the linear CATE model (LinearDML or SparseLinearDML)
coef(<LinearDRLearner>) coef(<SparseLinearDRLearner>)
Coefficient(s) of the linear CATE model (LinearDRLearner or SparseLinearDRLearner)
compute_propensity_score()
Compute propensity scores (train and optionally predict)
count_accuracy()
Accuracy metrics: estimated graph vs ground truth
counterfactual_unit_selection()
Counterfactual Unit Selection: select units to maximize beta*P(complier|X) + gamma*P(always-taker|X) + theta*P(never-taker|X) + delta*P(defier|X). Requires estimates of P(favourable|X,W=0) and P(favourable|X,W=1) (e.g. from outcome model). Complier: favourable iff treated. Always: favourable either way. Never: never favourable. Defier: favourable iff not treated.
counterfactual_value_estimator()
Counterfactual value estimator: E[(v - cc_w) * Y_w - ic_w]
create_table_one()
Create Table One: balance table for treatment vs control
dagma()
DAGMA unified interface
dagmaLinear()
DAGMA for linear SEMs
demo_linear()
Demo: linear NOTEARS on synthetic data
demo_nonlinear_mlp()
Demo: nonlinear NOTEARS (MLP) on synthetic data
demo_nonlinear_sobolev()
Demo: nonlinear NOTEARS (Sobolev) on random data
.build_causal_tree()
Build one honest causal tree
.compute_oob_variance()
OOB variance estimate (used when newdata = NULL)
.compute_variance_ij()
Variance estimation for new-data predictions via grouped IJ
.estimate_outcome()
Compute outcome residuals (Y - E[Y|X])
.estimate_propensity()
Compute propensity scores via logistic regression or provided values
.honest_split()
Sample split: return indices for two non-overlapping halves
.predict_tree()
Route a single observation through a tree, return leaf node
.resolve_weights()
Compute sample weights (uniform if NULL)
.weighted_var()
Variance of a weighted vector
doubleml_data_from_data_frame()
Build DoubleMLData or DoubleMLClusterData from a data frame
doubleml_data_from_matrix()
Build DoubleMLData from matrices (X, y, d, optional z, etc.)
doubleml_did_eval_preds()
Evaluate cross-fitted nuisance predictions for DoubleML DiD
doubleml_did_linear() doubleml_did_rf() doubleml_did_xgboost() doubleml_did_eval_linear() doubleml_did_eval_rf() doubleml_did_eval_xgboost()
DoubleML DiD wrappers (linear / ranger / xgboost nuisances)
doubleml_fetch_401k()
401(k) data (DoubleML fetch_401k)
doubleml_fetch_bonus()
Pennsylvania bonus experiment data (DoubleML fetch_bonus)
doubleml_make_pliv_CHS2015()
Simulated PLIV data (Chernozhukov, Hansen, Spindler, 2015)
doubleml_make_plr_CCDDHNR2018()
Simulated PLR data (Chernozhukov et al., 2018 Fig. 1 DGP)
doubleml_pliv()
Partially linear IV DML via DoubleML (DoubleMLPLIV)
doubleml_plr()
Fit Partially Linear DML via DoubleML (R) when available
doubleml_plr_fit_data()
Fit DoubleML PLR from a DoubleMLData object and mlr3 learners
doubleml_plr_tune_data()
Tune then fit DoubleML PLR (mlr3tuning + DoubleMLPLR$tune)
dragonnet()
DragonNet — shared representation and three heads (torch)
draw_network()
Draw a network (graph) with nodes and edges
draw_networkx_edges()
Draw network edges
draw_networkx_labels()
Draw node labels
draw_networkx_nodes()
Draw network nodes at given positions
driv_learner()
Doubly Robust Instrumental Variable (DRIV) learner for conditional LATE 3-fold cross-fit: fit e0(x), e1(x), m0(x), m1(x); then fit tau(X) minimizing DR IV loss.
dscm()
Deep Structural Causal Model (DSCM)
effect(<DynamicDMLearner>)
Effect of treatment change (DynamicDMLearner)
effect()
Effect of treatment change (generic)
estimate_ate(<DMLearner>)
Estimate ATE for DMLearner
estimate_ate(<DRLearner>)
Estimate Average Treatment Effect (ATE) for DR-Learner
estimate_ate(<DomainAdaptationLearner>)
Estimate ATE for DomainAdaptationLearner
estimate_ate(<RLearner>)
Estimate ATE for R-Learner. Like Python BaseRLearner.estimate_ate (analytical SE).
estimate_ate()
Estimate Average Treatment Effect from a fitted meta-learner or fit-predict
estimate_ate(<SLearner>)
Estimate ATE for S-Learner (analytical SE or bootstrap). Like Python BaseSLearner.estimate_ate. For LRSRegressor (learner = "lm") returns OLS coefficient and confint like Python LRSRegressor.estimate_ate.
estimate_ate(<TLearner>)
Estimate ATE for T-Learner. Like Python BaseTLearner.estimate_ate.
estimate_ate(<TMLELearner>)
Estimate ATE for TMLE Learner. Like Python TMLELearner.estimate_ate.
estimate_ate(<XLearner>)
Estimate ATE for X-Learner. Like Python BaseXLearner.estimate_ate.
estimate_ate(<default>)
Default ATE estimation dispatcher
estimate_ate_causalvae_ate()
Estimate ATE from CausalVAE_ATE model
explain_cate()
Compute SHAP values for any RCausalML CATE model
feature_importances(<DRPolicyForest>)
Feature importances (average over trees)
feature_importances(<DRPolicyTree>)
Feature importances from policy tree (variable importance from rpart)
feature_importances()
Feature importances for policy / tree models
filter_D()
Rank features by divergence measure (bin-based uplift filter)
filter_F()
Rank features by F-statistic of treatment-feature interaction
filter_LR()
Rank features by likelihood-ratio statistic of treatment-feature interaction
fit(<AutomatedMLModel>)
Fit AutomatedMLModel: select best learner via CV and refit on full data
fit(<DMLIVLearner>)
Fit DMLIVLearner (native R)
fit(<DMLearner>)
Fit DMLearner — cross-fitting and final stage (EconML DML.fit)
fit(<DRLearner>)
Fit DR-Learner
fit(<DRPolicyForest>)
Fit DR Policy Forest
fit(<DRPolicyTree>)
Fit DR Policy Tree
fit(<DomainAdaptationLearner>)
Fit a DomainAdaptationLearner model
fit(<DynamicDMLearner>)
Fit DynamicDMLearner (panel data, native R)
fit(<NonParamDMLIVLearner>)
Fit NonParamDMLIVLearner (native R)
fit(<OrthoIVLearner>)
Fit OrthoIVLearner (native R)
fit()
Generic fit for meta-learners
fit(<SLearner>)
Fit S-Learner
fit(<TMLELearner>)
Fit TMLE learner (stores outcome model; TMLE step done in estimate_ate)
fit(<policy_learner>)
Fit the policy learner
fit_predict(<DMLearner>)
Fit and predict (DMLearner)
fit_predict(<DRLearner>)
Fit and predict CATE (DR-learner)
fit_predict(<DomainAdaptationLearner>)
Fit and predict with DomainAdaptationLearner
fit_predict(<RLearner>)
Fit and predict R-Learner (like Python fit_predict)
fit_predict()
Generic fit_predict for meta-learners
fit_predict(<SLearner>)
Fit and predict S-Learner (like Python fit_predict)
fit_predict(<TLearner>)
Fit and predict T-Learner (like Python fit_predict)
fit_predict(<XLearner>)
Fit and predict X-Learner (like Python fit_predict)
fit_predict_cevae()
Fit CEVAE and predict ITE (fit_predict)
fruchterman_reingold_layout()
Alias for spring_layout (NetworkX name)
gain_curve()
Gain curve: cumulative sum of true tau (normalized to 1) when ordered by pred
ganite()
GANITE — Causal Inference with Generative Adversarial Nets
generate_data()
Generate synthetic data for CausalVAE examples
get_cumgain()
Get cumulative gain (Python get_cumgain). gain = lift * index (cumulative gain at each position).
get_cumlift()
Get cumulative lift (Python get_cumlift). Average uplift in cumulative population when sorted by pred descending.
get_forest_weights()
Forest kernel weights (grf)
get_importance()
Feature importance for uplift modeling (filter methods)
get_leaf_node()
Leaf node for each sample in a grf tree
get_tree()
Get a single tree from a grf forest
grf_average_treatment_effect()
Average treatment effect (grf implementation)
grf_causal_forest()
Causal forest (grf implementation)
grf_variable_importance()
Variable importance for a grf forest
instrumental_forest()
Instrumental forest (grf)
interaction_tree()
Interaction Tree (IT); binary treatment, continuous or binary outcome. For continuous outcome, leaf tau = E[Y|T=1] - E[Y|T=0]; split uses t-statistic on mean difference (Su et al.).
intercept(<LinearDML>) intercept(<SparseLinearDML>)
Intercept of the linear CATE model (LinearDML or SparseLinearDML)
intercept(<LinearDRLearner>) intercept(<SparseLinearDRLearner>)
Intercept(s) of the linear CATE model (LinearDRLearner or SparseLinearDRLearner)
intercept()
Intercept of the linear CATE model (generic)
interpret()
Interpret a CATE or policy model with a tree (generic)
interpret(<SingleTreeCateInterpreter>)
Interpret a CATE estimator with a single tree
interpret(<SingleTreePolicyInterpreter>)
Interpret a policy from a CATE estimator with a single tree
interventional_elbo_loss()
Negative ELBO loss for the Interventional CRL model
is_dag()
Check if weighted adjacency matrix W defines a DAG
iv_2sls()
Two-stage least squares (2SLS) for causal effect with instrumental variable First stage: W ~ Z + X. Second stage: Y ~ W_hat + X.
ivae()
iVAE (Identifiable Variational Autoencoder)
kamada_kawai_layout()
Kamada-Kawai layout (path-length cost)
late_iv()
Local Average Treatment Effect (LATE) via IV LATE = (E[Y|Z=1] - E[Y|Z=0]) / (E[W|Z=1] - E[W|Z=0])
list_causaldata_datasets()
List causaldata datasets supported for RCausalML
load_boosted_iv()
Load a BoostedIVForest model from disk.
load_causaldata()
Load a causaldata dataset in RCausalML-ready form
load_cxgboost()
Load a saved CXGBoost model from disk.
load_cxgboost_extensions()
Load causal boosting extensions from the R directory
load_multi_arm_causal_boost()
Load a saved MultiArmCausalBoost model
loss_function()
CausalVAE loss function
make_uplift_classification()
Uplift classification dataset
make_uplift_regression()
Uplift regression dataset (continuous outcome)
match_by_group()
Stratified nearest neighbor matching by group
match_optimizer()
Match optimizer: search for best caliper / pihat / score_cols
multi_arm_causal_forest()
Multi-arm causal forest (grf)
multipartite_layout()
Multipartite (layered) layout
nearest_neighbor_match()
Nearest neighbor propensity score matching
neuralGrangerML()
Alias for neural_granger_ml
neural_granger_ml()
Neural Granger Causality Models for Multivariate Time Series
notears_linear()
Linear NOTEARS: min L(W;X) + lambda1||W||_1 s.t. h(W)=0
notears_nonlinear
Nonlinear NOTEARS via Adam then L-BFGS (MLP or Sobolev)
one_sided()
One-sided confounding function (ATE)
one_sided_att()
One-sided confounding function for ATT
partial_rsqs_confounding()
Map partial R² of a feature to confounding amount (alpha range)
plot(<castle>)
Plot CASTLE graph
plot(<grf_tree>)
Plot grf tree (grf)
plot(<rank_average_treatment_effect>)
Plot rank_average_treatment_effect (grf)
plot_gain()
Plot gain chart (Python plot_gain). Uses get_cumgain for observed uplift so curve matches Python.
plot_qini()
Plot Qini chart: cumulative true treatment effect vs population fraction (like Python plot_qini)
plot_sensitivity()
Plot sensitivity analysis (Selection Bias causalsens output)
policy_feature_names()
Policy feature names (EconML API compatibility)
policy_learner()
Policy Learner: treatment assignment policy with doubly robust estimator
predict(<AutomatedMLModel>)
Predict using fitted AutomatedMLModel
predict(<DMLIVLearner>)
Predict CATE from fitted DMLIVLearner
predict(<DMLearner>)
Predict CATE from fitted DMLearner
predict(<DRLearner>)
Predict CATE from DR-Learner
predict(<DRPolicyForest>)
Predict recommended treatment (DR Policy Forest) — majority vote
predict(<DRPolicyTree>)
Predict recommended treatment (DR Policy Tree)
predict(<DomainAdaptationLearner>)
Predict CATE with a fitted DomainAdaptationLearner
predict(<DynamicDMLearner>)
Predict CATE (constant marginal effect) from fitted DynamicDMLearner
predict(<NonParamDMLIVLearner>)
Predict CATE from fitted NonParamDMLIVLearner
predict(<OrthoIVLearner>)
Predict CATE from fitted OrthoIVLearner
predict(<SLearner>)
Predict CATE from S-Learner
predict(<SingleTreeCateInterpreter>)
Predict CATE from the interpreted tree (simplified model)
predict(<SingleTreePolicyInterpreter>)
Predict recommended treatment from SingleTreePolicyInterpreter (alias for treat)
predict(<TLearner>)
Predict CATE from T-Learner
predict(<XLearner>)
Predict CATE from X-Learner. When p is NULL and model was fit without p, uses stored propensity or 0.5.
predict(<castle>)
Predict outcome from CASTLE
predict(<causalGAN>)
Predict from CausalGAN
predict(<causal_discrepancy_vae>)
Predict from CausalDiscrepancyVAE
predict(<causal_egm>)
Predict from CausalEGM
predict(<causal_forest>)
Predict treatment effects from a causal forest
predict(<causal_inference_tree>)
Predict method for causal_inference_tree
predict(<causal_vae>)
Predict latent codes from CausalVAE
predict(<cevae>)
Predict ITE from CEVAE (or placeholder)
predict(<cfrnet>)
Predict CATE from CFRNet
predict(<dragonnet>)
Predict CATE (and optionally propensity) from DragonNet
predict(<driv_learner>)
Predict conditional LATE from DRIV learner
predict(<dscm>)
Predict from Deep Structural Causal Model (DSCM)
predict(<ganite>)
Predict ITE from GANITE
predict(<instrumental_forest>)
Predict with an instrumental forest (grf)
predict(<interaction_tree>)
Predict method for interaction_tree
predict(<ivae>)
Predict latent representation from iVAE
predict(<neural_granger_ml>)
Predict from neural Granger models
predict(<policy_learner>)
Predict treatment assignment (0 or 1)
predict(<tarnet>)
Predict CATE from TARNet
predict(<uplift_rf>)
Predict CATE (and optionally probabilities) from uplift_rf object. When full_output=TRUE and model has tree leaves with p0/p1, returns data.frame with control, treatment, delta (Python-style).
predict(<uplift_rf_multi>)
Predict from uplift_rf_multi. full_output=TRUE returns Python-style DataFrame.
predict(<uplift_tree_ddp>)
Predict from single uplift tree (DDP, IDDP, IT, CIT)
predict(<uplift_tree_iddp>)
Predict method for uplift_tree_iddp
predict_best_treatment()
Predict best treatment for each unit
predict_best_treatment(<counterfactual_value_estimator>)
Predict best treatment from value estimator
predict_proba(<AutomatedMLModel>)
Predict class probabilities using fitted AutomatedMLModel (classification only)
predict_proba(<DRPolicyForest>)
Predict probability of recommending each treatment (DR Policy Forest) Average of tree probabilities.
predict_proba(<DRPolicyTree>)
Predict probability of recommending each treatment (DR Policy Tree)
predict_proba()
Predict probability of treatment assignment (P(treat))
predict_proba(<policy_learner>)
Predict probability of treatment assignment (P(treat))
predict_value(<DRPolicyTree>)
Predict expected value under each treatment (DR Policy Tree) Returns the predicted CATE (value vs control) for each treatment.
predict_value()
Predict expected value under each treatment (policy value)
print.causal_forest()
Print method for causal_forest
print_optimization_summary()
Print optimization summary for CausalVAE helpers
propensity_glm()
Logistic regression propensity score
propensity_glmnet()
Elastic net propensity score model (glmnet)
propensity_model
Propensity model object (abstract interface)
propensity_model_elastic_net()
Elastic net propensity model
propensity_model_gradient_boosted()
Gradient boosted propensity model (XGBoost)
propensity_model_logistic_regression()
Logistic regression propensity model (elastic net)
qini_curve()
Qini curve: cumulative true treatment effect when units ordered by predicted CATE (descending)
qini_score()
Qini score for each model column in a results data frame (like Python qini_score)
qini_score_vec()
Qini score: area under Qini curve (trapezoidal)
r_learner_continuous()
Generalized R-learner for continuous treatment (dose-response on a grid)
random_layout()
Random layout: place nodes uniformly at random in the unit square
rank_average_treatment_effect()
Rank-weighted average treatment effect (grf)
rank_average_treatment_effect.fit()
Rank-weighted average treatment effect fit (grf)
rcausalml-datasets LBC_data diabetes ihdp_npci_3 sachs_data sachs_labels
Datasets included with RCausalML
rcausalml-extra-objects MultiArmCausalBoost multi_arm_ATE multi_arm_PEHE coef
Additional exported RCausalML objects
register_boosted_iv_parsnip()
Register a parsnip model spec for BoostedIVForest (tidymodels shim).
regression_metrics()
Regression metrics (MSE, MAE, R2) by treatment group
rescale_layout()
Rescale layout positions to (-scale, scale) on all axes
rescale_layout_dict()
Rescale a layout given as named list or matrix
run_cxgboost_example()
Run the built-in CXGBoost demonstration.
run_example()
Run the built-in demonstration example.
run_multi_arm_causal_boost_example()
Run a built-in multi-arm causal boost example
save_boosted_iv()
Save a BoostedIVForest model to disk.
save_cxgboost()
Save a CXGBoost model to disk (standalone wrapper).
save_multi_arm_causal_boost()
Save a MultiArmCausalBoost model
sensitivity()
Create a sensitivity analysis object
sensitivity_analysis()
Run sensitivity analysis for one or more methods
set_automated_ml_workspace() setAutomatedMLWorkspace()
Set configuration for AutomatedML (local experiments)
set_random_seed()
Set random seed for reproducibility (R and torch)
shell_layout()
Shell layout: place nodes in concentric circles (shells)
simulate_dag()
Simulate random DAG with expected number of edges
simulate_easy_propensity_difficult_baseline()
Synthetic data: easy propensity, difficult baseline (Setup C)
simulate_hidden_confounder()
Synthetic data: hidden confounder (Louizos et al.)
simulate_linear_sem()
Simulate samples from linear SEM
simulate_nonlinear_sem()
Simulate samples from nonlinear SEM (mlp, mim; no GP)
simulate_nuisance_and_easy_treatment()
Synthetic data with difficult nuisance and easy treatment (Setup A)
simulate_parameter()
Simulate SEM edge weights for a DAG
simulate_randomized_trial()
Synthetic data: randomized trial (Setup B)
simulate_unrelated_treatment_control()
Synthetic data: unrelated treatment and control (Setup D)
smd()
Standardized Mean Difference (SMD) of a feature between treatment and control
spectral_layout()
Spectral layout (eigenvectors of graph Laplacian)
spiral_layout()
Spiral layout
split_frequencies()
Split frequencies of a grf forest
spring_layout()
Spring layout (Fruchterman-Reingold force-directed)
summary.castle()
Summarize CASTLE structure
summary.causal_forest()
Summary method for causal_forest
synthetic_data()
Main entry: generate synthetic data by mode
tarnet()
TARNet — Treatment-Agnostic Representation Network
temporal_causal_loss()
Total loss for the Temporal Causal VAE
test_calibration()
Test calibration of a grf forest
train_causalvae()
Train CausalVAE from dataloaders
treat()
Assign treatment from a policy interpreter (generic)
treat(<SingleTreePolicyInterpreter>)
Assign treatment using the interpreted policy tree
tune_hyperparameters()
Tune CausalVAE hyperparameters
uplift_forest_plot()
Plot multiple trees from an uplift forest (ensemble visualization)
uplift_rf_chi()
Uplift RF with Chi-squared criterion
uplift_rf_cts()
Uplift Random Forest on Contextual Treatment Selection (CTS) Split criterion: expected value of best treatment in children vs parent.
uplift_rf_ed()
Uplift RF with Euclidean distance criterion
uplift_rf_kl()
Uplift random forest using KL divergence splitting criterion
uplift_rf_multi()
Multi-treatment uplift random forest (Python UpliftRandomForestClassifier-style). Fits one uplift forest per treatment arm (control vs treatment_k). predict(..., full_output=TRUE) returns control/treatment probabilities, deltas, recommended_treatment, max_delta.
uplift_tree_ddp()
Uplift tree on delta-delta-p (DDP) criterion; binary outcome only
uplift_tree_iddp()
Uplift tree on IDDP criterion; binary outcome only
uplift_tree_plot()
Plot an uplift tree (base R), with arrows connecting each split to its children
uplift_tree_string()
Print uplift tree as a string (for interpretation and diagnosis)
uplift_tree_to_rpart()
Convert an uplift tree (list) to an rpart object for use with rpart.plot
variable_importance()
Variable importance from split frequency

On this page

Developed by RCausalML Authors.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
